articles.title: India growth expected to be around 6.5% this year: Gita Gopinath
articles.description: India's economy is projected to grow at 6.5% this year. Global risks persist, impacting supply chains and potentially leading to food price increases. Companies are absorbing costs, but this may not last. Central banks might delay rate cuts due to muted global demand. Any oil shock will affect many sectors.

articles.description: The French luxury house brings its travelling retail concept to Raffles City Shopping Centre, featuring signature green interiors, leather goods, a cafe kiosk and a photo booth.

articles.description: The case has quickly drawn global attention, not just for the scale of the alleged misconduct but for what it reveals about the vulnerabilities emerging at the intersection of national security and decentralised finance.

articles.title: Karnataka Heatwave Alert: Health Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao Appeals for ‘Self-Lockdown’ Amid Rising Sunstroke Cases
articles.description: Karnataka is facing a severe heatwave with temperatures crossing 42°C in several districts. Health Minister Dinesh Gundu Rao has urged citizens to follow a ‘self-lockdown’ during peak hours as sunstroke cases rise and hospitals remain on high alert.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Audrey Hepburn: "Success is like reaching an important..."
articles.description: Audrey Hepburn’s quote reveals that success doesn’t change who we are inside. True fulfilment comes from self-growth, values, and perspective, not fame or achievements.

articles.title: Ankur Warikoo's wife walked away from Rs 20 LPA job and instead chose happiness, organic farming and Rs 20,000 salary. Why?
articles.description: Ruchi Warikoo's career journey challenges traditional success metrics. She left a Rs 20 lakh salary at a Channel for organic farming, accepting an 88% pay cut. This shift brought her happiness and fulfilment. Now, she manages her husband, Ankur Warikoo's, business. Her story highlights that career paths are unpredictable, shaped by curiosity and evolving priorities, not just fixed plans.

articles.title: Delhi IRS officer’s daughter rape-murder case: Police to conduct psychological analysis of accused
articles.description: When questioned about his presence in the house, Meena allegedly lied, claiming the victim's mother had invited him in. The situation deteriorated quickly when he demanded cash. The victim refused. An argument broke out, and as she began screaming for help, Meena allegedly lost control, striking her repeatedly in the face with a lamp, leaving her with severe bruising and head injuries.

articles.title: Premier Energies Shares Rebound From Day's Low Despite US Duties On Indian Solar Imports
articles.description: Last year, India, Indonesia and Laos accounted for $4.5 billion in US solar imports, nearly two-thirds of the total, according to government trade data.

articles.title: BMC : जैन संस्थेवर मुंबई महापालिका मेहरबान, विल्सन जिमखान्यानंतर आणखी एक वसतीगृह देण्याचा घाट
articles.description:
Mumbai News : विल्सन जिमखान्यानंतर (Wilson Gymkhana) आणखी एक वस्तीगृह जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशनला (JIO) देण्याचा मुंबई महानगर पालिकेने घाट घातल्याचे समोर आलं आहे. जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑर्गनायझेशनने (Jain International Organisation) कांदिवली येथील 17 हजार 679.600 चौ. फु. भूखंड महापालिका लिजवर देण्याससंदर्भात सुधार समितीच्या बैठकीत प्रस्ताव मांडण्यात आला आहे. आर दक्षिण विभागातील कांदिवली येथील आकुर्ली येथे तळमजला + 5 मजले इमारतीमधील जागेवर 18 वर्षावरील विद्यार्थींकरिता बांधण्यात आलेल्या वस्तीगृहाचे व्यवस्थापन आणि प्रचलन करण्यासंदर्भात हा प्रस्ताव असल्याची माहिती आहे. तर मुंबई महानगर पालिकेकडून (Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation) जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशन (Jain International Organisation) संस्थेची नियुक्ती करण्यासंदर्भात सुधार समितीमध्ये हा प्रस्ताव देण्यात आल्याची माहिती आहे.

Mumbai News : महानगर पालिका दर महा प्रति चौ. फु. 5 रुपये दर आकारणार

मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, मुलींसाठी बांधलेले वसतिगृहाची देखभाल जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशन ही संस्था करणार असून याचे महानगर पालिका दर महा प्रति चौ. फु. 5 रुपये दर आकारणार आहे. याप्रमाणे मुंबई महानगर पालिका महिन्याला 88 हजार 400 रु जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशन वसुल करणार आहे. याअगोदर मरीन ड्राइव्ह येथील विल्सन जिमखाना जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशनला (JIO) देण्यावरून वाद झाला होता. हे प्रकरण ताजे असतानाच विल्सन जिमखान्यानंतर आणखी एक वस्तीगृह जैन इंटरनॅशनल ऑरगॅनायझेशनला (JIO) देण्याचा मुंबई महानगर पालिकेच्या निर्णयाने नवा वाद पेटण्याची शक्यता आहे.

Mumbai News : पालिकेकडून 30 वर्षाच्या लिजवर भूखंड देण्याचा प्रस्ताव

दरम्यान, यासोबत अनेक सामाजिक संस्थाना माफक दरात भूखंड देण��याचे प्रस्ताव आजच्या सुधार समितीच्या बैठकीत आले आहेत. यात जवळपास 10 ते 12 विविध विभागातील भूखंड विविध संस्थांना देण्यासंदर्भात आज प्रस्ताव मांडण्यात येणार असल्याची माहिती आहे. यामध्ये डायलेसिस सेंटर, सिटीस्कॅन, MRI, सोनोग्राफी, कॅथलॅब यांची उभारणी करण्यासाठी पालिकेकडून 30 वर्षाच्या लिजवर भूखंड देण्याचा प्रस्ताव आहे. त्यामुळे या प्रकरणात पुढे नेमकं काय होतं, हे पाहणे महत्वाचे ठरणार आहे.

इतर महत्वाच्या बातम्या

  • Mumbai Wilson Gymkhana: 'आपला विल्सन जिमखाना जिवंत राहायला हवा, परप्रांतीयांच्या घशात घालू देणार नाही'; गिरगावमध्ये जैन-मराठी वाद पेटणार?
  • Amol Mitkari on Ajit Pawar Plane Crash : अजितदादांच्या अपघाताआधी अघोरी प्रकार; सहयोग घर, काटेवाडी घर, विद्या प्रतिष्ठानमध्ये जाण्याआधी तिथंही पूजा, बोकड उलटं टांगलं अन्....; अमोल मिटकरींच्या पोस्टने खळबळ

articles.title: The temperature trap: Why your prime egg storage spot is actually a safety risk
articles.description: Storing eggs in the refrigerator door is a common mistake that compromises their safety and longevity. Constant temperature fluctuations in the door area can lead to condensation, allowing bacteria to penetrate the shell. For optimal freshness and safety, keep eggs in their original carton in the cooler, more stable middle or lower sections of the fridge.

articles.title: Why your airtight room could make you sick this winter?
articles.description: Sealing homes for winter saves energy but can trap harmful indoor pollutants like CO2 and VOCs. Over-sealing without proper ventilation leads to poor air quality and potential health issues. Short, timed window openings can effectively refresh air without significant heat loss, balancing warmth and clean indoor environments.

articles.title: That invisible layer on your phone screen is more important than you think
articles.description: Your phone's screen has a delicate nano-coating that can be damaged by rough fabrics and harsh cleaners like alcohol or ammonia. Aggressively wiping your screen with the wrong materials slowly removes this protective layer, making it prone to smudges and scratches.

articles.title: The one pantry mistake that is quietly ruining your onions
articles.description: A common pantry habit of storing onions and potatoes together is harming your groceries. Onions release moisture, promoting fungal growth, while potatoes emit ethylene gas that speeds up onion decay. This leads to premature sprouting and rotting for both. Separating these vegetables into well-ventilated, cool, and dry spaces significantly extends their shelf life.

articles.title: Fee transparency for parents: Dhanbad schools mandated to provide detailed fee structures; Parents can now pay fees quarterly
articles.description: Dhanbad's private schools must now provide detailed fee breakdowns and allow quarterly payments, as mandated by the district administration. Development fees require clear justification, and re-admission charges are banned. Schools are also prohibited from selling books and uniforms on-site, promoting market competition and affordability for parents.

articles.title: Sanju Samson joins Rohit, Jayasuriya in elite MI vs CSK centurions list
articles.description: Sanju Samson made history as the first CSK player to score a century against MI. His 101 off 54 balls, his second ton this season and fifth in the IPL, propelled CSK to a formidable 207-6 at Wankhede Stadium after a mixed start to the season.

articles.title: World-class tourism plans: Arunachal plans Subansiri Lower Pondage as tourism hub; Seeks central support for sustainable development
articles.description: In an exciting development, Arunachal Pradesh is reshaping the Subansiri Lower Pondage into a vibrant mountain and river tourism destination. Combining ecotourism, thrilling adventures, and rich cultural experiences, this groundbreaking initiative harnesses the power of India’s largest hydroelectric project.

articles.title: We are all Iranian: Ghalibaf Hits Back at Trump's Infighting Remark
articles.description: Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf rejected Donald Trump's claims of internal divisions, asserting 'iron unity' and 'complete obedience' to the Supreme Leader, and warning any 'aggressor' would regret their actions.

articles.title: ISL 2025-26: Hernandez's late winner gives Kerala Blasters 2-1 win
articles.description: Kerala Blasters FC edged Odisha FC 2-1 in the ISL, thanks to a dramatic stoppage-time header from substitute Matias Hernandez. Victor Bertomeu scored the opener for the hosts before Rahim Ali equalised for the visitors.
